# 🚀 Top 10 Fastest-Growing Finance Repos This Week

> This list is **auto-generated every Sunday at 00:00 UTC** by scanning hundreds of finance,
> fintech, quant, crypto, and trading repositories for weekly star growth.

⏳ **The first automated list will appear after the workflow runs on Sunday.**  
You can also trigger it manually: **Actions → Weekly Finance Repo Update → Run workflow**

---

## 📚 Archive

Previous weeks will appear here automatically.

---

## ⚙️ How It Works

1. Tracks 300+ finance/fintech/crypto/quant GitHub repos
2. Every Sunday, fetches current star counts and calculates weekly growth
3. Ranks by `Δ stars` (new stars gained in 7 days)
4. Publishes the Top 10 here + on the [GitHub Pages site](https://davidlifschitz.github.io/fastest-growing-finance-repos/)
5. Monthly discovery scan adds newly trending repos automatically

## 🏷️ Topics Tracked

`finance` · `fintech` · `quant` · `algorithmic-trading` · `cryptocurrency` · `trading-bot` ·
`quantitative-finance` · `defi` · `blockchain-finance` · `stock-market` · `options-trading` ·
`portfolio-management` · `backtesting` · `high-frequency-trading` · `crypto-trading`
